//: Copy this to your project root as .mcp.json (Claude Code) to add fak as an MCP server. fak serve --stdio speaks newline-delimited JSON-RPC over stdin/stdout and exposes the kernel's adjudication verbs as MCP tools — your agent can route a proposed tool call through fak_adjudicate before running it, run a tool through fak_syscall, or screen a result it executed itself through fak_admit. Build the binary first: `go build -o fak ./cmd/fak` (or use a release binary on your PATH), then point `command` at it. No network, no API key — the stdio transport needs no listener and no auth surface.
